title: Fix dynamic Tailwind classes in CardDeck component
description: CardDeck.tsx uses rotate- which won't compile. Need to use inline styles or computed class strings.

title: Add error boundaries and loading states to routes
description: App has no error boundaries - crashes will show blank screen. Add error boundaries and loading states for better UX.

title: Connect Admin panel to database for card persistence
description: Admin panel stores cards in local state only - changes are lost on refresh. Need to wire up to database.

title: Add API routes for database CRUD operations
Implement card voting/rating UI (thumbs up/down)
description: Prisma schema has RATING_UP/RATING_DOWN interaction types. Previous Next.js implementation had thumbs UI but was lost during Vite migration. Need to add voting UI to Card component that records UserInteraction records.

title: Prisma Client Setup & Database Migration - Install Prisma 6, generate client, run SQL migration in Neon, create user_profiles table, set admin role, create /api/auth/user-role endpoint
Remove unused .next/ folder and clean up partial Next.js migration artifacts
description: The project uses Vite but has a .next/ directory suggesting a reverted Next.js migration. Clean up these unused files.
